results.title: Reward token in GaugeFactoryCL can be drained by anyone
results.reasoning: The audit report does not mention GaugeFactoryCL, createGauge, or the createEternalFarming flow. No access control issue on GaugeFactoryCL.createGauge or the 1e10 reward seeding/approval drain path is described. All reported issues concern other contracts (VotingEscrow, VoterV3, Bribes, RewardsDistributor, Genesis, GaugeManager, etc.). Fixing any reported issue would not address the lack of access control on GaugeFactoryCL.createGauge, so this specific vulnerability was not detected.
